title: Something Inside of Me
overview: Shuichi lives a normal high school life until a mysterious stranger threatens to reveal his incredible secret.

title: What It Means to Be Empty
overview: As the mysterious attacker closes in, Clair discovers something about Shuichi’s costume form… And that changes everything.

title: Elena
overview: Shuichi and Clair begin to search for Clair’s missing sister.

title: I Wish I Was Someone Else
overview: After encoutering Elena, Shuichi and Clair are guided to the source of all the mysterious happenings.

title: Crazy Enemies
overview: Clair and Shuichi wander into the mountains, and encounter a strange and powerful monster.

title: Gatherers
overview: After defeating an evil monster, Clair uses information he had to form a connection with a strange group of gatherers.

title: Metamorphosis
overview: Yoshioka and Shuichi encounter a fearsome foe while searching for her wallet.

title: Shadows in Memory
overview: Clair and her new allies recover Shuichi and Yoshioka. What did Yoshioka see when she was in Shuichi?

title: Staked Claims
overview: Koyanagi leads the team through the mountains, and they discover a suspicious and troubling mark.

title: Beautiful Flower
overview: A terrible ultimatum from a powerful enemy makes Clair, Shuichi, and their friends face an impossible decision.

title: The Price of Resolve
overview: Everyone returns to town, but they must come to terms with what happened in the mountains.

title: Where the Promise Was Made
overview: A few months earlier, a series of strange events happened among Shuichi and his childhood friends.

title: We Two Are One
overview: Shuichi and Clair attempt to strike a deal with the other members of their team, as Yoshioka reaches out to Elena.
